purpose: Reusable YouTube thumbnail template for mystery-driven animal videos. Swap the subject, headline text, and arrow target while preserving the same visual style.

style_identity.reference_style: minimal composition with one realistic subject, simple large text, bright arrow, and glowing cutout on a deep purple background
style_identity.brand_feel: curious, slightly eerie, educational, visually simple

background.texture: very subtle haze or soft grain only

rules: keep wording short and easy to read
do not let text overlap the subject
text should occupy the upper-left quadrant

subject.orientation: facing right or slightly toward frame edge
rules: subject must be the only main object
subject should fill a large part of the frame
subject anatomy must remain readable at small size
keep the pose clear enough to show the unusual feature
arrow should clearly point to the unusual anatomy or mystery detail
arrow should not block the main subject
arrow should visually connect text area to subject area

composition.layout_type: text left, subject right, arrow bridging toward key feature
composition.negative_space: leave open space around text and around subject silhouette
composition.balance_rule: frame should feel uncluttered and instantly readable on mobile

thumbnail_logic.story_function: Show one strange creature and direct attention to the weird body part without overexplaining.
thumbnail_logic.curiosity_trigger: The viewer sees a realistic animal, a provocative title, and a pointer to an unusual feature.
thumbnail_logic.click_reason: The thumbnail implies a hidden biological oddity that the video explains.

replaceable_fields.subject_description: realistic echidna with visible hind legs

prompt_template.base_prompt: Create a clean YouTube thumbnail in a 16:9 layout with a deep purple gradient background. Place bold lowercase white text in the top-left reading '{headline_text}' with a soft dark shadow. On the right side, place one highly realistic cutout of a {subject_description}. Add a soft neon green glow around the subject. Include one thick curved red arrow starting from the left side and pointing to the subject's {arrow_target}. Keep the composition simple, bold, mysterious, and readable on mobile. No clutter, no extra objects, no busy scenery.

example_values.subject_description: realistic echidna with clearly visible backward-looking hind legs

do: use deep purple as the main background color
use neon green glow around the subject
use one red arrow to point at the weird feature
keep the frame clean and easy to read
dont: do not use long explanatory text
do not make the background busy
do not use more than one arrow
do not hide the key anatomy
